category_sources: source_facts.description says reverse tethering tool for Android; official GitHub README describes reverse tethering over adb for Android.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Gnirehtet.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides requirements, installation, run commands, environment variables, and developer link.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Genymobile/gnirehtet, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/topics identify Android, adb, reverse tethering, VPN-style operation, and Rust implementation.
